title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Select CityWalk

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Select CityWalk
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
